title: Frequently Asked Questions
description: Answers to the most common questions about the Khedemtak platform

questions.question: How can I publish a new service?
questions.answer: You can publish a new service by clicking the 'Post Your Service' button on the homepage, then filling out the form with your service details.

questions.question: Can I edit my service after publishing it?
questions.answer: Yes, you can edit your service at any time through your dashboard in the account page.

questions.question: How can I contact service providers?
questions.answer: You can contact service providers through phone calls or by sending direct messages via the platform.

questions.question: Is using the platform free?
questions.answer: Yes, browsing and searching for services is completely free. Subscription fees are only required for publishing services.

questions.question: How can I search for a specific service?
questions.answer: You can use the search bar or browse services by category and location from the search page.

questions.question: What payment methods are available?
questions.answer: We accept payments through credit cards and local bank accounts.

questions.question: How can I report a problem?
questions.answer: You can contact us through the contact page or send a direct message via the platform.

questions.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
questions.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings.

contact.question: Didn't find an answer to your question?
